description: Style NotePep up your wardrobe with this simple, smart and stylish kurta from aurelia. Its pure cotton composition gives you round the clock comfort. Team it with beige leggings and orange flats for a casual and chic look. Product DetailsOrange kurta, three quarter sleeves, round neck with slit, patch with weave detail at neck and sleeve hem, vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shade inside outHot iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8", chest 33") is wearing a size M
